name: EPF
message: About EPF  EPF was founded as EPF Elettrotecnica in 1961 and since then it has been working on a National and International level in the automation and industrial plant design sectors.  Headquarters: 24 Via Langhe, Carru', Piedmont, 12061, Italy Phone Number: +39 17375106 Website: www.epf.it Linkedin: http://www.linkedin.com/company/epf-solutions-for-energy-&-automation Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/epf-103277656857058 Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/epfenergy
